name: Raspberry Cream Cheese Coffee Cake2
recipeInstructions:
1. Partially thaw frozen raspberries; do not completely thaw.
2. In a medium mixing bowl, stir together flour, bran, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
3. Make a well in the center of the flour mixture.
4. In a small mixing bowl, combine beaten egg, milk, and oil. Add all at once to the flour mixture. Stir just until moistened.
5. Fold in the raspberries.
6. Grease bottoms of muffin cups or line with paper baking cups. Fill 2/3 full.
7. Bake in a 400 degree oven for about 20 minutes or until done.
8. Remove from pan and cool slightly on wire racks.
Makes 12.
